INSERT INTO timestamps_range SELECT * FROM range(TIMESTAMP '2001-04-10', TIMESTAMP '2001-04-11', INTERVAL 30 MINUTE);
CREATE TABLE events (event_id INT, event_time TIMESTAMP);
SELECT e.event_id FROM events e JOIN timestamps_range t ON e.event_time = t.event_time WHERE t.event_time BETWEEN TIMESTAMP '2001-04-10' AND TIMESTAMP '2001-04-11';
SELECT * FROM range(TIMESTAMP '2000-12-31', TIMESTAMP '2001-01-01', INTERVAL 1 HOUR);
SELECT * FROM range(TIMESTAMP '2023-01-01 00:00:00', TIMESTAMP '2023-01-02 00:00:00', INTERVAL 2 HOUR) WHERE EXTRACT(HOUR FROM value) IN (0, 12);
CREATE TABLE incremented_timestamps AS SELECT value FROM range(TIMESTAMP '2001-04-10 00:00:00', TIMESTAMP '2001-04-10 01:00:00', INTERVAL 10 MINUTE);

SELECT t.value, COUNT(e.event_id) as event_count FROM range(TIMESTAMP '2001-04-10 00:00:00', TIMESTAMP '2001-04-10 02:00:00', INTERVAL 15 MINUTE) t LEFT JOIN events e ON e.event_time = t.value GROUP BY t.value ORDER BY t.value;
SELECT t.value FROM range(TIMESTAMP '2001-01-01', TIMESTAMP '2001-01-02', INTERVAL 24 HOUR) t WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM events e WHERE e.event_time = t.value);
